textByHash.00ab5a8afb7ee659f6626eb53e5c604d907e7df1: Hello there...have you delivered the message to Romeo yet? What news do you have from my loved one?
textByHash.0f7815c11a810a0afa2e9e8daa79f193e78d186b: ...and this is the great idea for getting me out of here?
textByHash.16fb9d59339d18876dd4128ba98f7e78ed27f6d6: And all I got was indigestion. I am done with men like him.
textByHash.26dde3f9869a81c87dba9084c50869d1e10ad77c: She's going to make it seem even more convincing!
textByHash.376e86039e1fe4834ed0e2b0ed5d9935447b436c: Oh yes, I'm sure that Father Lawrence will come up with a solution. I hope you find him soon.
textByHash.417807ef2d0be8250939ead91ff77c86558833ed: Oh no! I long to be close to my true love Romeo!
textByHash.5338ba9081639b67390367d85a9dad11bebd14fd: Oh, that's a shame. I've been waiting so patiently to hear some word from him.
textByHash.53bd1c8059f6fe69de77a798ce7a61b569289b04: Oh, I hope it isn't a love potion because you would be wasting your time. My love for Romeo grows stronger every minute...
textByHash.67e8fb262152566412991c07f16258f96430e9a8: Wonderful! I just hope Romeo can remember to get me from the crypt.
textByHash.7362f06b26614cc658ced810e9d153fd2b7f5646: Many thanks! Oh, I'm so very grateful. You may be our only hope.
textByHash.7ea71c3ea2efd76ab01a0bc9cf86d0d81dfddc35: Oh, here's Phillipa, my cousin...she's in on the plot too!
textByHash.807eec691e65949e1147ec91a150db847210db37: I sat in that cold crypt for ages waiting for Romeo.
textByHash.822019e28a9fa58805e96b8d820b8edd0592ea5c: That useless fool never showed up.
textByHash.8541dd82fe5fa79834c72a28bc16f411e27f09a1: Romeo, Romeo, wherefore art thou Romeo?
textByHash.88fe28c483571d90f2d7ec165b72b6e563c28213: Please go to Romeo and make sure he understands. Although I love his gormless, lovelorn soppy ways, he can be a bit dense sometimes and I don't want to wake up in that crypt on my own.
textByHash.9174c051952ede3953c1759232bf9112d51c861f: How could you lose that message? It was incredibly important...and it took me an age to write! I used joined up writing and everything!
textByHash.93bb5f842b0b00e07a5fe52fe07ab274839a704a: Fair luck to you, the end is close.
textByHash.a03d12613cd2d367dcf8e3d167510f44c9469feb: Yes, unfortunately my father is quite the hunter, you may have seen some the animal head trophies on the wall. And it would be so awful to see Romeo's head up there with them!
textByHash.b06556b5a3425521ac7fabcbcd1324d71e58bc00: Please, take this new message to him, and please don't lose it.
textByHash.c597f5d6025c804bf168668f6c2f4a4dff7c90ba: Oh good! I knew Father Lawrence would come up with something. However, I don't know where the apothecary is...I hope you find him soon. My father's temper gets no better.
textByHash.d2b9e3424715858782620a698072e2fa70cefa7d: Ok...if this is the best we can do...hand over the potion!
textByHash.d4c75168a768bc6c871d17604da89700abeef196: That's not what I was suggesting at all...
textByHash.db5282b6fd3c60aa3eeca988c6d73b33b780d915: Hi , how close am I to being with my true love Romeo?
textByHash.e22a025e6431e99a960e8cfb77793297aa305931: Oh how my heart soars to hear this news! Please take this message to him with great haste.
textByHash.ec896d09394344a1b3c04fa768c746fe947a9251: Everything is explained in the letter, would you be so kind and deliver it to him please?
textByHash.eccdd63e8dbb6c59cbeab4f187cffd0e1f64e73c: Oooooh, a cold dark creepy crypt...
textByHash.f1f237f4e4a6fb8f3b4447085411777ecad7bd28: Now go away before I call my father!
textByHash.f3f833bc860dd9569228dd263e7f5dae7cd563fb: He's quite often upset...the poor sensitive soul. But I don't think he's going to take this news very well, however, all is not lost.
